The construction combines durable suede leather with protective features to ensure durability on tough rocky terrain. The shoe uses an anatomically shaped fit and a specialized Vibram outsole that provides stability and grip on dry and wet surfaces. Construction of the Garmont Dragontail LT Evo trekking shoe upperThe base of the upper is suede leather with a thickness of 1.6 to 1.8 mm treated with a waterproof PFC-free treatment. To increase mechanical resistance in the dirt and on rocks, the perimeter of the shoe is equipped with a rubber boot and a reinforced toe to protect the leather from abrasion. items.raw_desc: Fúrókalapács Einhell 4258508 TE-RH 32-1600 4F Elektromos fúrókalapács:The Einhell TE-RH 32-1600 4F electric drill hammer is a versatile helper for the home or workshop, offering 4 functions - drilling, impact drilling and chiselling with or without locking. Thanks to its 1600 W motor and pneumatic impact mechanism, the hammer can handle even very demanding applications such as cutting into stone, brick or concrete. Effective demolition is made possible by powerful impact impulses that disrupt the material structure while the chisel rotates through the material and breaks it out. In addition, the drilling power can be easily adjusted to the task at hand using the electronic speed control. A comfortable and safe two-handed grip is ensured by the ergonomic Softgrip handle, which is complemented by the front additional handle. There is also a handy depth stop and a robust SDS-Plus semi-automatic clamping mechanism that allows quick and easy tool-free changing of drill bits and chisels. The Einhell TE-RH 32-1600 4F drilling hammer comes in an E-Box transport and storage case....
